prompt:
Scene:
A square official-selection poster set on a damp village bridge at blue hour, with lantern haze, thin mist over black water, weathered timber railings, and desaturated teal, moss, and bone tones. The atmosphere should feel literary and prestigious, not horror pulp. Compose the frame with calm negative space, carefully weighted verticals, and the sense that a restrained festival title block could exist without any readable text being present.

Subject:
Create an original fandom-coded detective crossover centered on a young folklorist investigator in a wool coat, facing a fox-masked local guide across the bridge, while a child carrying a sealed evidence box stands several steps behind. The trio should imply a supernatural mystery rooted in village ritual, but the poster treatment must remain serious and adult. Use body language, distance, and mirrored reflections in the water to suggest suspicion, tenderness, and unresolved truth rather than overt fantasy action.

Important details:
The visual language should mimic a real festival selection one-sheet: sparse, elegant, and emotionally loaded. Keep the lighting soft and naturalistic, with wet wood, wool texture, faint lantern bloom, and careful silhouette clarity. The fandom energy should come from archetype precision and mythic detail, not from loud creature effects. This must read like a premium mystery drama packaged for Cannes or Venice, not a streaming fantasy thumbnail.

Use case:
Festival Poster Fandom Crossover single study 6/9, testing a folklore-detective premise inside restrained official-selection poster grammar.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no jump-scare monster reveal, no bright anime saturation, no detective-board collage, no action chase, no magical particle overload, no modern city skyline, no exaggerated costume cosplay finish.
title: Folklore Detective Selection
description: A village-mystery poster combining folklore archetypes with official-selection restraint.

generation.runner_notes: Independent festival poster study translating folklore mystery archetypes into an official-selection one-sheet.

en.title: Folklore Detective Selection

alt.en: A folklorist detective faces a fox-masked guide on a misty village bridge in a restrained festival poster.
alt.zh-CN: 一位民俗侦探在雾气中的村桥上面对狐面向导，形成一张克制的影展海报。
